problem id: 77e60a3e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  11010100 -> 01011101
  01000111 -> 01000101
  00101100 -> 10011110
  01001001 -> 00110101
  01101010 -> 10101110
  10011011 -> 10101011
  11110011 -> 11101111
  10101011 -> 00101010
  00100001 -> 01110110
  11000000 -> 11111101

query: 00101101
predicted answer: 00010110
